calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Feb-03-2010 Vacated

APPLICATION PENDING FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68633, CRC 3.51, 8.26, AND 8.818
Off Calendar Feb-03-2010 Denied

HEARING ORDERED FOR APPLICATION OF WAIVER OF COURT FEES
Off Calendar Feb-03-2010 Denied

OTHER SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Feb-03-2010 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: This matter comes on calendar for an Unlawful Detainer Settlement Conference.
Dept. 218, Commissioner: William Gargano; Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha; Not Reported.
Appearances:
Ivy Tseng, Esq. for and with the Plaintiff Avalon California Value V LLC., represented by agent Dave Shelsea-Seifert.
Ming Chung, Esq., through limited scope, for and with the Defendant(s):Shoshana Asher.
The Judge Pro Tem Irving Pfeffer, litigants and counsel confer privately in Dept. 207 for settlement discussions.
The parties enter into a signed agreement "Stipulation and Order", which was filed.
Case settled, matter is taken off calendar.
